Damn dude. I've watched YTPs forever, and I've watched a ton of yourself over the years. I don't really seek them out, they find their way to me and then I'll go down a rabbit hole for a while.

Point is, I didn't realize a side effect of AI would be essentially making most YTPs pretty pointless, because you can make anyone say anything. 

But man, you still make this format work. These are great. I have a soft spot for this style of audio and video manipulation, it just adds an extra layer of silliness that you just don't get if the person in question just says it through AI.

Great job and god speed, pooper.

text:
My older brother admitted at Thanksgiving this year that he almost bought one of these horrible things and only because he and his fiance were still getting the money together did they then get to see just how sh*tty the vehicles are and how much of a terrible  purchase that would've been (they truly thought it would be some kind of an investment). They had a light bulb moment of realizing that the $100K for a goddamn car could instead go towards a house. He admits it was a very stupid idea, but I don't care if you're buying a Bugatti, NO vehicle is worth spending that kind of money on! At the absolute least, not before getting essentials like a house secured first.

Now, it should be noted that this is the same person who is half-way doomsday prepping and wants me to move to his city because "when the end happens, we're going to need each other." I love my sibling but can only love him from afar as our opinions on pretty much most things differ greatly from each other. And I would not want to share my final damn days on this planet with anyone who EVER thought that buying a f*cking Cybertruck was a good idea.
